fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer you want to create a finance charge memo for.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer the finance charge memo is for.

fields.name: Name 2
fields.tooltip:
Contains an additional part of the name of the customer that the finance charge memo is for.
The program retrieves the name from the Customer table when you fill in the Customer No. field.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer the finance charge memo is for.

fields.name: Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city name of the customer the finance charge memo is for.

fields.name: County
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the county name of the customer the finance charge memo is for.
The program retrieves the county name from the Customer table when the Customer No. field is filled in.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the country/region code of the customer the finance charge memo is for.
The program retrieves the country/region code from the Customer table when you fill in the Customer No. field.
The program uses the country/region code to format the customer's address on printouts.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the language code of the customer that the finance charge memo is for. To see the language codes in the Language table, click the field.
The program retrieves the language code from the Customer table when you fill in the Customer No. field. This field is blank if no language code has been entered on the customer's card.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code of the finance charge memo.

fields.name: Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person you regularly contact when you communicate with the customer the finance charge memo is for.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's reference. The content will be printed on the related document.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Customer Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's market type to link business transactions to.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the general business posting group of the customer.
The program retrieves the code from the Customer table when you complete the Customer No. field.
The code specifies to which general business posting group this particular customer belongs.
The program uses the business code, together with the Gen. Product Posting Group and the Gen. Posting Type, to look up VAT conditions and G/L accounts in the General Posting Setup.
To see the general business posting groups in the Gen. Business Posting Group table, click the field.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip:
Shows the customer's VAT registration number.
The program retrieves the VAT registration number from the Customer table when you fill in the Customer No. field. The field is blank if no VAT registration number has been entered on the customer card.
Normally, you should not change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the finance charge memo header's reason code. A reason code is a code you choose that will enable you to trace the entry. To see the reason codes in the Reason Code table, click the field.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the finance charge memo should be issued.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when payment of the amount on the finance charge memo is due.

fields.name: Fin. Charge Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the involved finance charges in case of late payment.

fields.name: Post Interest
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether or not any interest calculated on the finance charge memo will be posted to the general ledger and customer accounts when the finance charge memo is issued. A check mark in the check box indicates that interest will be posted.
The program retrieves the contents of this field from the Finance Charge Terms table when you fill in the Fin. Charge Terms Code field. You can change the code on an individual finance charge memo, however.

fields.name: Post Additional Fee
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether or not any additional fee listed on the finance charge memo will be posted to the general ledger and customer accounts when the finance charge memo is issued. A check mark in the check box indicates that if there is an additional fee, it will be posted.
The program retrieves the contents of this field from the Finance Charge Terms table when you fill in the Fin. Charge Terms Code field. You can, however, change the code on an individual finance charge memo.
Whether or not an additional fee (in LCY or foreign currency) is added to the finance charge memo is determined by the contents of the Additional Fee (LCY) fields in the Finance Charge Terms window and the Currency for Fin. Charge Terms window.

fields.name: Posting Description
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a description of the finance charge memo for use in posting.
The program automatically fills in the Posting Description field with the text "Finance Charge Memo" and the finance charge memo number when you fill in the No. field.
The posting description appears on G/L and customer ledger entries that result from the finance charge memo.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether or not a comment has been entered for this finance charge memo.
When you issue a finance charge memo, all comments will be copied to the issued memo.
You can also enter a comment in Notes FactBox.

fields.name: Remaining Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the remaining amounts on the finance charge memo lines. The remaining amount is in the currency represented by the currency code on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: Interest Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the interest amounts on the finance charge memo lines.

fields.name: Additional Fee
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the additional fee amounts on the finance charge memo lines.

fields.name: VAT Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the VAT amounts on the finance charge memo lines. This amount is in the currency represented by the currency code on the finance charge memo header.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign the finance charge memo's number.

fields.name: Issuing No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign a number to the finance charge memo when it is issued. To see the number series that have been set up in the No. Series table, click the field.
The program automatically copies the number series code from the Issued Fin. Chrg. M. Nos. field in the Sales & Receivables Setup table.

fields.name: Issuing No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the issued finance charge memo that will be created if you issue the finance charge memo header.
When you issue the finance charge memo header, the program will enter the next number from the number series in the Issuing No. Series field unless you manually enter a number.
If you manually enter a number, it will not cause a gap in the number series.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the tax area code for the customer.
The program retrieves the code from the Customer card when you complete the Customer No. field.
To see the tax area codes in the Tax Area table, click the field.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip: Copies the value in this field from the corresponding field on the customer card when you enter the customer number. field.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the VAT business posting group of the customer.
The program retrieves the code from the customer card when you complete the Customer No. field.
To see the VAT business posting groups in the VAT Business Posting Group table, click the field.

fields.name: VAT Reporting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date used to include entries on VAT reports in a VAT period. This is either the date that the document was created or posted, depending on your setting on the General Ledger Setup page.

fields.name: Company Bank Account Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bank account to use for bank information when the document is printed.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


The dimension set ID is not edited directly by users. The value of the field is calculated with the dimension values that users select in the Edit Dimension Set Entries window.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Assigned User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who is responsible for the document.
